subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God and Maidservants of the Merciful! Thank ye God that the Divine call reached the ear of the spirit... Praise be to God, that the doors of the Kingdom are opened... In the world of existence the meeting is blessed when the white and colored meet together
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
